title: CIR Lifecycle Event
description: One line of timeline/events.jsonl — an append-only record of when/why a model element changed. The join between structural change (Liquibase/JPA) and context (git commit → ticket).

ts.description: When the change took effect (commit date, or changeSet order time).

element.description: Canonical element id this event affects (see element.schema.json#id).

change.description: The concrete operation. Liquibase: createTable, addColumn, dropColumn, renameColumn, addForeignKeyConstraint, addUniqueConstraint, createIndex, addNotNullConstraint, ... JPA: field-added, annotation-changed, ...

source.description: Where the structural change was observed.

changeSetId.description: Liquibase changeSet id (often embeds the ticket).

commit.description: The git commit that introduced this change (correlation result; absent if not found).

tickets.description: Tickets parsed from the commit message / branch / changeSet id.

details.description: Raw operation payload (the changeSet op as parsed) — kept verbatim for audit and downstream synthesis.
